title: justicia anselliana
intro: Justicia anselliana, also known as the forest jewel or Ansell's justicia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Justicia anselliana include the treatment of fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Justicia anselliana are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
